name: Mystery Island:Missing Amy
short_description: The adventure begins when Ada, a young explorer, receives a mysterious selfie from her sister, who in fact disappeared months ago. ...... The background of the selfie is a mysterious island with blood-red sea water. Ada decides to go out on the sea to look for her sister……
detailed_description:
When truth drowns in crimson tides, only the keenest eyes can pierce the veil.

【Prologue: Veil of Shadows】

The adventure begins when young explorer Ada receives a mysterious selfie from her sister. Though the missing girl smiles brightly in the photo, the strange island in the background radiates an ominous aura. Driven by her months-long search for her vanished sister, Ada embarks on a perilous journey to this enigmatic land. After numerous setbacks, she secures passage with a ship captain whose motives seem as murky as the waters they'll cross. Braving stormy seas aboard a rickety vessel, the determined explorer and her enigmatic guide plunge into the heart of a maritime tempest.

【Island of Whispers】

Emerging from life-threatening perils, Ada finally reaches the island where blood-tinged waves crash against scarlet shores. Beneath its deceptively picturesque surface lies unsettling anomalies: aircraft wreckages dotting cliffs, skeletal remains in shadowy caves, and the captain's increasingly erratic behavior. Can Ada unravel these mysteries while navigating the island's deadly secrets?

As Ada, you'll:

・Investigate meticulously - Scrutinize environments for hidden clues

・Craft ingenious tools - Combine resources to overcome obstacles

・Connect the threads - Piece together evidence to reveal dark truths

【Abyss of Revelation】

Is this truly a forgotten island? Deep within its core, faint hums of operational machinery echo through hidden laboratories. As Ada stealthily evades armed patrols to infiltrate these facilities, she discovers conspiracies far beyond her worst fears. Will she rescue her sister and escape this nightmare?

With immersive visuals and intricately woven narratives, Mystery Island: Missing Amy challenges players to become the ultimate detective. Every detail forms a strand in the web of truth - only razor-sharp observation and deductive brilliance can illuminate the path through this harrowing adventure.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
